en.extract:
The short-toed coucal (Centropus rectunguis) is a species of cuckoo in the family Cuculidae. It is found in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, and Thailand. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist shrubland. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''short-toed coucal''' ('''''Centropus rectunguis''''') is a species of [[cuckoo]] in the family [[Cuculidae]]. It is found in [[Brunei]], [[Indonesia]], [[Malaysia]], and [[Thailand]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and [[subtropical or tropical moist shrubland]]. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
